meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-value projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a bottleneck to high-ticket clients. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you can deploy production-grade applications in hours, not weeks. This strategy allows you to build a robust, feature-rich portfolio rapidly, proving your technical authority and accelerating your freelance revenue growth immediately.
content.intro:
You sit there with the skills of a senior engineer, yet your portfolio remains an empty void. Clients don't want to hear about your potential; they want to see the architecture you've already shipped. The gap between 'capable' and 'hired' is bridged only by the evidence of your past work.

Stop waiting for the perfect client project to arrive. By adopting a high-velocity SaaS starter kit, you transform your development workflow from manual labor into a systematic production line. This is how you reclaim your time, dominate your niche, and turn 'no portfolio' into a competitive advantage.

steps.title: Architect the Core Blueprint
steps.description: Define the foundational schema for your SaaS. Focus on authentication, billing, and database architecture so you have a repeatable base for every client project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular Next.js 14 architecture with Supabase integration. Include boilerplate for user roles, Stripe checkout sessions, and protected API routes.

steps.title: Configure the Identity Layer
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade authentication. Speed is vital, but security is the foundation of your professional reputation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Clerk authentication with multi-tenant support. Ensure middleware handles session redirects and protects private dashboard routes effectively.

steps.title: Integrate Payments & Subscriptions
steps.description: Don't write billing logic from scratch. Use your starter kit's pre-configured Stripe webhooks to handle subscription lifecycle events.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up Stripe webhooks to listen for 'customer.subscription.created' and 'invoice.payment_succeeded' events, mapping them to the Supabase users table.

steps.title: Build the UI Component Library
steps.description: Use Shadcn/UI to build custom, high-fidelity components that make your portfolio look like it cost $50k to develop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable dashboard layout with a sidebar, data table with filtering, and a notification toast system using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI.

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Establish a CI/CD pipeline that triggers on push, ensuring your portfolio is always live and ready for prospect review.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always build your portfolio SaaS around a niche problem (e.g., HVAC scheduling) rather than a generic template to show you understand business logic.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes; clients rarely ask, but showing test coverage in your repo signals elite engineering maturity.
Document your architectural decisions in a 'Design Decisions' file in your repo; it acts as a conversation starter during client interviews.
Keep your starter kit modular; if a client asks for a specific feature, you should be able to swap it in via your CLI tool in under 10 minutes.
Host your portfolio SaaS on a custom domain that matches your freelance brand, not a generic Vercel preview link.
content.next_steps: Once your first portfolio SaaS is live, document the 'Client Problem -> Technical Solution -> ROI' story on your personal site and LinkedIn to attract your first paying lead.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to outpace the competition. Stop building from zero and start scaling your freelance business with a robust, repeatable system. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
